speaker: MATT
raw_text: Percy's over there. All righty, so, that all being the case, guys, as Grog shouted, at this moment the individuals in the center of the square start looking around, confused, not knowing where to come from. At this moment, a few of them manage to catch up a glance at the individuals that are on the rooftops. I need everyone to roll initiative, along with you, Grog, because combat has begun again at this point at the top.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit. What the-- what?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What are you? What the fuck are you? Oh my God!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I want a d10!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And look, Ashley's, like, somewhere, I can't even see.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Please tell me that was a gift from somebody.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I made this myself, because I wanted you all to know how passionate I was about tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sam? Could you kiss your right gun?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Kiss it! Kiss it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mm. Tastes like strawberries. And sweat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Inspiration granted and immediately taken away.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do your pants also have photoshopped lightning coming out of the crotch?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, my pants are just jeans.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, how far down does it go?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All the way, baby.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's the first step of the process. The pants come soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you just do that at home with a--?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I just penciled it in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I can't even. That's a thing. All righty, so, with that, we are going into the realm of battle. Let's go ahead and kick on the proper music for this. So, with Vox Machina currently on the rooftops here and hiding within the bottom of this building, we have the four archers that have appeared on the rooftop of the Margrave's house. We have most of the individuals that are surrounding this, along with the few innocents, which just for the sake of appearance, here, I will go ahead and attempt to mark with a few markers so you know who you're looking for, innocents-wise.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're the innocents, Matt. We're the innocents.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you're not. Not anymore. All right, so, the red markers are going to act as markers for the innocent, just so you're aware.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Percy. Percy! Taliesin! You're on that roof, right?
